CustomField.description: Total amount converted to payable to be paid out to the lessee. [LOAD:Optional] [JUSTIFICATION:Populate when CM is converted to Payable] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API:NA] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API:NA] [COMMENTS:NA]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Total amount converted to payable to be paid out to the lessee.
CustomField.label: Related Payable Amount
